description: Light walk-forward protocol for short data windows (preliminary screening only)
rationale: Light protocol uses 3-fold WF on 87-day window. Insufficient for live deployment confidence. Candidates must pass full default protocol (730/365/365) before live promotion.
explicit_limitations: 3 foldy total - marginally sufficient for trend detection, insufficient for robust confidence intervals
~80 trades per train fold - vulnerable to regime-specific overfitting compared to full protocol
No full regime cycle guarantee - 50-day train may capture partial uptrend or partial downtrend only
87-day window = Q1 2026 only - seasonal bias risk (crypto Q1 historically differs from Q2-Q4)
Min trades per window (15) more conservative than default protocol (5), but less than typical production threshold (30)
trade_rate_assumption: ~1.5-1.7 trades/day based on recent windows (geometry_sensitivity runs 2025-2026)
when_not_to_use: Clean data ≥ 365 days available - use default protocol instead
Expected trades < 50 total in window - results will be noise
Live deployment decision - light protocol is preliminary screening only
High-stakes parameter search - need ≥10 folds for stable metric distribution
